He explores Uniphore’s approach to leveraging small language models for use cases such as claims and billing, as well as the trade-offs with frontier models used for cybersecurity and coding agen

title: Americans Are Stuck in a Rut — And a Lack of Fun Might Be to Blame
title_cn: 美国人陷入墨守成规——缺乏乐趣可能是罪魁祸首
summary:
America appears to be suffering from a fun shortage. From the rising cost of concert tickets, to bowling alley and nightclub closures, to venue shortages for kids to play in local sports leagues, the fun deficit is real and it's making Americans more isolated and lonelier than previous generations.

Bloomberg's Ben Steverman joins Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin on the Everybody's Business podcast to explore some easy solutions to bring fun back into our everyday lives. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Month After SpaceX IPO, Tesla’s Stock Keeps Holding Its Ground
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股一个月后，特斯拉股价保持坚挺
summary: In the weeks leading up to SpaceX’s monster IPO, many Wall Street pros feared the deal represented an existential threat for Elon Musk’s other giant, Tesla Inc. But after a month in the stock market, the outcome is far from clear.

title: Prediction Market Bets Surge on World Cup Mania
title_cn: 预测市场对世界杯狂热的投注激增
summary: Rabid interest in the World Cup has helped to drive more than $3 billion of wagers on a prediction market backed by Robinhood Markets Inc. and Susquehanna International Group, which launched just a few months ago.

title: SK Hynix Set to Make Record-Setting US Debut
title_cn: SK 海力士将在美国首秀创纪录
summary: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 美国和伊朗在重新爆发战斗后继续谈判，油价稳定
summary: Oil steadied as the US and Iran continued talks despite a flare-up in fighting that strained their ceasefire and deterred tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: AlphaQuest Founder Lost Control at Quant Fund, Investor Alleges
title_cn: 投资者称 AlphaQuest 创始人失去了对量化基金的控制
summary: AlphaQuest founder Nigol Koulajian admitted losing control of trading at his $2 billion quantitative hedge fund before announcing plans to shut it down, an institutional investor claimed in a lawsuit.

title: Macro Hedge Fund Deem Raised $1 Billion From Abu Dhabi’s ADIC
title_cn: 宏观对冲基金 Deem 从阿布扎比 ADIC 筹集 10 亿美元
summary: Asfandyar Nadeem’s hedge fund has received about $1 billion in new capital from an Abu Dhabi investor, amid a surge in appetite for macro strategies and as the Gulf city accelerates its drive to become a key backer of the industry.

title: Foreign Ownership of UK Firms Soared 35% Amid Glut of Deals
title_cn: 由于交易过剩，英国公司的外资所有权飙升 35%
summary: The number of British companies controlled by overseas firms soared 35% in the years after the outbreak of Covid, as cheap valuations drove a dealmaking boom.

title: Czech Price Pressures Warrant Increased Caution for Central Bank
title_cn: 捷克的物价压力使央行更加谨慎
summary: The Czech central bank said monetary policy caution remains warranted, with the headline inflation rate likely to return to or “slightly above” the 2% target this year following a recent drop.

title: Delta Reaffirms Profit Guidance as Premium Demand Rises
title_cn: 随着保费需求上升，达美航空重申利润指引
summary: Delta Air Lines Inc. reaffirmed its full-year profit guidance and said strong demand for premium, corporate and international travel helped offset the highest quarterly fuel expense in its history, Stephen Trent, president and founder of SDT Capital Advisors, says the earnings and guidance were solid and shows the carrier surprised some on Wall Street. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Does Not Want All Out War in Iran, Cook Says
title_cn: 库克表示，特朗普不希望伊朗爆发全面战争
summary: Steven Cook, Council on Foreign Relations Middle East Senior Fellow, says it's unclear how President Donald Trump will "finish the job" in Iran. But Cook says Trump does not want to see a return to all out combat. Cook speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cómo criar hijos en una de las capitales más calurosas de Europa
title_cn: 如何在欧洲最热的首都之一抚养孩子
summary: Desde elegir el momento para ir al parque hasta tomar duchas frías, criar hijos en Madrid ofrece un adelanto de cómo el cambio climático está transformando la vida familiar en toda Europa. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shein Gets Approval From Chinese Regulator for Hong Kong IPO

summary: Shein Global Holdings Ltd. got approval from the Chinese regulator to move ahead with its planned initial public offering in Hong Kong, capping a yearslong effort by the fast-fashion giant to go public.

summary: SpaceX may finally be within reach for public-market investors, but analysts say there’s a cheaper opportunity to get exposure to shares of the space technology company through EchoStar Corp.

summary: SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in its ADR offering, the largest first-time US share sale by a foreign company. A US official says talks with Iran on a peace deal continue. Seema Shah of Principal Asset Management discusses Federal Reserve Chair Warsh naming leaders of the five task forces. Nadia Martin Wiggen of Svelland Capital looks at the volatile week in oil. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Corn Drops as Heat Threat Eases Ahead of Key US Supply Report
title_cn: 在美国重要供应报告发布之前，热威胁有所缓解，玉米价格下跌
summary: Corn futures fell for a third day as the immediate threat of extreme heat in the US eased. Traders are also awaiting the US Department of Agriculture’s WASDE report, due later Friday.

title: Inflation Is a Tailwind for European Stocks, Morgan Stanley Says
title_cn: 摩根士丹利表示，通胀是欧洲股市的顺风车
summary: European equities stand to benefit from higher inflation, according to Morgan Stanley’s Marina Zavolock, who says the market underestimates the region’s exposure to sectors that profit from rising prices. "We have a lot of real asset exposure, we have banks exposure,” Zavolock, the firm’s chief European equity strategist, tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SMFG Said to Weigh Strategy for India Assets Including Yes Bank
title_cn: SMFG 称将权衡 Yes Bank 等印度资产战略
summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc. is evaluating its India strategy as it looks for ways to consolidate its presence in one of the world’s fastest-growing banking markets, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: BioOrbit CEO on Developing Cancer Treatments in Zero Gravity
title_cn: BioOrbit 首席执行官谈零重力下癌症治疗的开发
summary:
Katie King, cofounder and CEO of BioOrbit, discussed the company's recent milestone in producing protein crystals in space. BioOrbit launched a record-breaking mission to the International Space Station, achieving the largest scale production of protein crystals in a microgravity environment by one to two orders of magnitude. 
King spoke to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Must Increase Space Autonomy: ESA's Aschbacher
title_cn: 欧洲必须增强太空自主权：欧洲航天局的阿施巴赫
summary:
The man who oversees Europe's space agenda says the continent needs to do much more as it pursues greater autonomy in orbit.
Europe is trailing the US in efforts to develop a space economy, underscored by SpaceX's mega IPO in June. Josef Aschbacher, Director General of the European Space Agency, spoke to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Vanke Says First-Half Loss May Widen to $2.2 Billion
title_cn: 万科表示上半年亏损可能扩大至22亿美元
summary: China Vanke Co. said its first-half loss could reach $2.2 billion due to low gross margins on property development projects and asset impairment charges.

title: Semiconductor Stocks Are Overbought, Morgan Stanley's Shalett Warns
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的沙利特警告说，半导体股票已超买
summary: Lisa Shalett, Morgan Stanley Wealth Management CIO, discusses the current state of the semiconductor sector, highlighting that chip stocks have become meaningfully overbought with some indexes up nearly 100% year-to-date before recent pullbacks. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe's Space Race | Bloomberg Tech: Europe 7/10/2026
title_cn: 欧洲的太空竞赛|彭博科技：欧洲 7/10/2026
summary:
In this episode of Bloomberg Tech: Europe, Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie launches into Europe's efforts to develop its burgeoning space economy.  SpaceX has shown the might of American space technology - and financial muscle - with its record-breaking IPO. Bloomberg Tech: Europe looks at where Europe is lacking in the space race, and how it can secure space autonomy.

"Bloomberg Tech: Europe" spotlights the biggest names and trends shaping the region's technology ecosystem as the global competition heats up. This monthly, 30-minute magazine-style show features in-depth interviews with top technology leaders, as well as major investors and policymakers - giving you a compelling A to Z of the most consequential innovations, opportunities and challenges.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Raytheon, Rheinmetall Anchor AI Training Effort for UK Army
title_cn: 雷神公司和莱茵金属公司为英国陆军提供人工智能训练
summary: The UK Ministry of Defense awarded a £2 billion ($2.7 billion) contract for AI-based military training to a Raytheon-led consortium that includes European defense prime Rheinmetall AG.

title: EU Escalates Meta Probe Over Addictive Design That Hooks Children

summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd. employees sold shares on London’s new private market at a 10% discount to the self-driving technology startup’s previous valuation, according to people familiar with the matter.

title_cn: SK 海力士在美国首次亮相创造历史

summary: The surge in tech campaigns on public transit is spurring satirists from New York to London to create their own versions.

title_cn: 主权人工智能可能意味着国家支持的模式和政治紧张局势
summary: Washington wants in on the artificial intelligence gold rush.

title: Big Tech Doubles Debt Load to $350 Billion in AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 大型科技公司在人工智能方面的支出狂潮，债务负担翻了一番，达到 3500 亿美元
summary: The largest builders of artificial intelligence data centers have doubled their debt load in the last five years, turning to borrowing to finance an unprecedented spending spree they claim is needed to transform the economy.

title: Spain's Cuerpo: 'Window Of Opportunity' For Joint EU Debt
title_cn: 西班牙库尔波：欧盟联合债务的“机会之窗”
summary: Spanish Economy Minister Carlos Cuerpo said he sees a chance to revisit the idea of joint borrowing within the European Union, despite initial skepticism to a proposal he made on the subject this week from member states such as Germany and the Netherlands. Cuerpo made the comments in an exclusive interview with Bloomberg Television's Oliver Crook on Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Once-Struggling SK Hynix Became a Trillion-Dollar Company
title_cn: 曾经陷入困境的 SK 海力士如何成为价值万亿美元的公司
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is hardly a household name. But the maker of memory chips, which two decades ago was struggling to survive, is now South Korea’s second-most valuable listed company, just behind Samsung Electronics Co.

title: Web Scraper Sets $1 Million ‘Bug Bounty’ As Industry Scrutinized
title_cn: Web Scraper 设立 100 万美元“Bug 赏金”以应对行业审查
summary: Bright Data Ltd., an Israel-based startup that sells web scraping tools and datasets, is set to announce a $1 million “bug bounty” to root out bad actors as law enforcement steps up scrutiny of its industry.

title: SK Hynix ADR Allocation to Key Investors Said to Be Scaled Back
title_cn: SK 海力士对主要投资者的 ADR 分配据称将缩减
summary: Key investors in SK Hynix Inc.’s $26.5 billion US listing received fewer American depositary receipts than initially anticipated, according to people familiar with the matter, as other buyers snapped up the deal.

title: BNP Likes Chinese Tech Stocks as AI Rotation Play Unfolds
title_cn: 随着人工智能轮换游戏的展开，法国巴黎银行看好中国科技股
summary: Sophie Huynh, portfolio manager at BNP Paribas Asset Management, discusses the outlook for tech stocks and why she sees value in China. "In a world where Europe is stuck in the middle, we could come to a world where the AI frontier models in the US stay in the US, but China at the same time is just six months behind," Huynh tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Rides AI Boom to Blockbuster US Listing | Insight with Haslinda Amin 07/10/2026

The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gates Heir’s Shopping App Claimed Sales It Didn’t Drive
title_cn: 盖茨继承人的购物应用程序声称其并未推动销售
summary: Phia, an advertising startup co-founded by Phoebe Gates, daughter of billionaire Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates, bills itself as a “personal shopping assistant” that helps users find the lowest prices on a broad range of clothes and fashion accessories.

title: China Omits Job Goal for First Time in Decades as AI Spreads
title_cn: 随着人工智能的普及，中国几十年来首次省略就业目标
summary: China dropped a numerical target for urban job creation over the next five years for the first time in decades, in an apparent nod to rising uncertainty over employment as AI spreads through the economy.

title: Drone Startup Helsing Alters Staff Stock Plan Before Round

summary: European defense startup Helsing has overhauled its internal share program, alienating some staff as the company finalizes its biggest funding round to date.

title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion in Biggest Foreign Debut in US
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国融资 265 亿美元，成为最大规模的海外首秀
summary: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary receipt offering, as the South Korean memory chipmaker powered through volatility to deliver the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company.

title: SoftBank Names Ex-Goldman Sachs Trader Agne to Lead Vision Fund Finances
title_cn: 软银任命前高盛交易员 Agne 领导愿景基金财务
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. has picked former Goldman Sachs trader Mark Agne to oversee finance and technology at the Vision Fund, people familiar with the matter said.

title: EU Banks Urged to Pool Buying Power in Deals With US Tech Giants
title_cn: 欧盟银行敦促在与美国科技巨头的交易中汇集购买力
summary: Banks and finance firms should combine their buying power to avoid losing out in negotiations with US tech giants, according to raft of Dutch proposals aimed at tackling Europe’s over-dependence on foreign providers of critical services such as AI and cloud computing.

title: Adani Flagship Is the Next Big India Pick for Singapore’s Helios
title_cn: 阿达尼旗舰店是新加坡 Helios 的下一个印度大选择
summary: Helios Capital Management is betting on the flagship stock of India’s Adani Group to be the next big winner for its funds in a market left behind in the global AI frenzy.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 7/10/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 7/10/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix’s US Trading Debut Unleashes Wave of New Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: SK海力士在美国上市，掀起新杠杆ETF浪潮
summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s record-setting US debut is paving the way for a fresh wave of leveraged products tied to the South Korean memory giant’s shares, bringing to Wall Street the popular bets that have amplified the stock’s volatility in Seoul.

title: TCS CEO: AI Could Reach 20% Revenue, Jobs Shift
title_cn: TCS CEO：人工智能可实现收入20%，工作岗位转移
summary: Tata Consultancy Services CEO K. Krithivasan says AI could reach about 20% of revenue within four to six quarters, as automation reshapes roles and new AI jobs emerge across business. He spoke with Haslinda Amin and Menaka Doshi on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Supreme Leader to Hold Memorial Ceremony for Slain Father
title_cn: 伊朗最高领袖将为遇害父亲举行追悼会
summary: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei will hold a memorial ceremony for his predecessor and father Ali Khamenei on Friday, his office said, sparking speculation that the Islamic Republic’s top official could make his first public appearance since the war.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over But Talks on Deal to Continue
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火已经结束，但协议谈判仍将继续
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over.

title: Qatar Blocks Defense Joint Venture Between VW, Israeli Firm
title_cn: 卡塔尔阻止大众与以色列公司之间的国防合资企业
summary: Qatar’s sovereign wealth fund vetoed a deal for Volkswagen AG to make vehicles supporting Israel’s Iron Dome mobile air-defense system, a plan intended to save hundreds of jobs at one of the German car manufacturer’s sites.

title: Reform UK Decries ‘Smear Campaign’ After Fresh Finance Probe Report
title_cn: 改革英国谴责新金融调查报告后的“抹黑运动”
summary: Reform UK’s deputy leader Richard Tice said his party was being subjected to a “smear campaign” after a newspaper reported that London police are investigating a £500,000 ($671,000) donation.

title: Trump Won’t Sign Housing Bill But Will Allow It to Become Law
title_cn: 特朗普不会签署住房法案，但将允许其成为法律
summary: President Donald Trump said he would not sign a bipartisan housing bill in protest over lawmakers declining to approve a separate voter-ID bill he has prioritized.

title: Hungary Unveils Agency to Recover Lost Orban-Era Assets
title_cn: 匈牙利成立机构以追回丢失的欧尔班时代资产
summary: Hungary’s government unveiled plans for a new investigative authority with the power to prosecute suspects and recover misappropriated public assets, fulfilling one of Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s key anti-corruption pledges.

title: German Lawmakers Approve Health Bill With Drug-Price Cuts
title_cn: 德国立法者批准医疗法案并降低药品价格
summary: German lawmakers approved a comprehensive overhaul of the country’s statutory health-insurance system that forces drug-price reductions on pharmaceutical companies as part of a wider drive to cut billions of euros in costs.

title: Erdogan’s NATO Gift of Revolvers Runs Into Europe’s Gun Laws
title_cn: 埃尔多安向北约赠送的左轮手枪违反欧洲枪支法
summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan’s parting gift to the NATO leaders he hosted this week was a revolver, and an accidental expose of squeamish European attitudes to firearms.

title: Turkey, Egypt Block LGBTQ Cruise Entry Over ‘Moral Values’
title_cn: 土耳其、埃及以“道德价值观”为由阻止 LGBTQ 邮轮入境
summary: Turkey and Egypt have blocked a cruise ship carrying more than 1,900 LGBTQ tourists from entering their ports, with the former citing a supposed threat to Turkish society.

title: Democrats Rush to Replace Platner as GOP Rejoices Over Divisions
title_cn: 共和党因分歧而欢欣鼓舞，民主党人急于更换普拉特纳
summary: Graham Platner’s political demise has set off an unprecedented scramble to find a replacement to take on Republican incumbent Senator Susan Collins, with at least six Democrats entering the wide-open field and less than four months until the November midterms.

title: Burnham Clears Final Hurdle to Becoming Next UK Premier
title_cn: 伯纳姆扫清了成为下一任英国首相的最后障碍
summary: Andy Burnham will replace Keir Starmer as Britain’s next prime minister, after securing the support of enough Labour MPs to prevent a rival challenger.

title: US Says Iran Talks to Continue Despite Hormuz Skirmishes
title_cn: 美国表示，尽管发生霍尔木兹小规模冲突，伊朗谈判仍将继续
summary: Talks between the US and Iran over a permanent peace deal are continuing, according to a American official, despite two days of clashes that threatened to shatter an already fragile ceasefire.

title: Hundreds Of Labour MP's Back Andy Burnham For PM
title_cn: 数百名工党议员支持安迪·伯纳姆竞选总理
summary: Andy Burnham's path to becoming the next UK prime minister looks certain after a vast majority of Labour MPs formally nominated him to be the next party leader. At the end of the first day of the party's leadership contest to replace Keir Starmer, 322 of 403 Labour members of Parliament voted for Burnham. Responding to the confirmation of the vote number, Burnham said he was "deeply grateful" for the support he's received from party colleagues, saying it "reflects a shared belief that Britain needs a new approach to politics." Bloomberg Opinion's Rosa Prince joins Caroline hepker and Rachel Evans on Daybreak Europe to discuss.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Again Warns Russia Not to Use Nuclear Arms Against Ukraine
title_cn: 中国再次警告俄罗斯不要对乌克兰使用核武器
summary: China has again told Russia not to even consider using a nuclear weapon against Ukraine, according to President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.

title: Falling Israel Support Shapes US Political Battles Ahead
title_cn: 以色列支持率下降影响美国未来的政治斗争
summary: Americans’ shifting views are influencing foreign policy debates in both parties

title: Here’s Who Could Replace Graham Platner on the Maine Ballot
title_cn: 谁可以取代缅因州选票上的格雷厄姆·普拉特纳
summary: Maine Democrat Graham Platner’s withdrawal from the race for a US Senate seat unleashed a scramble by a handful of candidates who have little time to build support ahead of a convention the party is planning before a July 27 deadline to confirm a name on the ballot.

title: EU to Allow Ukraine to Buy UK Weapons With its €60 Billion Loan
title_cn: 欧盟允许乌克兰用600亿欧元贷款购买英国武器
summary: The European Union is set to allow Ukraine to purchase British weapons with the €60 billion ($69 billion) it’s loaning the war-torn nation for defense procurement.

title: Turkey Seeks to Offload Russian Weapon to Secure F-35 Access
title_cn: 土耳其寻求卸载俄罗斯武器以确保 F-35 进入
summary: Turkey is seeking Russia’s consent to transfer air defense systems it bought from Moscow to a third country, an effort aimed at clearing the way for the purchase of US-made F-35 fighter jets.

title: Indonesia Police-Military Tensions in Focus After Jakarta Raids
title_cn: 雅加达袭击事件后，印度尼西亚军警紧张局势成为焦点
summary: Indonesian officials sought to play down signs of a rift between security agencies after police raids in Jakarta brought several alleged graft cases into public view and drew a senior prosecutor into a widening controversy.

title: Peru Tests the Limits of Trump’s Anti-China Stance
title_cn: 秘鲁考验特朗普反华立场的极限
summary: President-elect Keiko Fujimori seems unwilling to ditch her father’s legacy of ties to Beijing.

title: Indonesia’s Prabowo Hosts Ex-Thai PM Thaksin for Danantara Talks
title_cn: 印度尼西亚普拉博沃接待泰国前总理他信参加达南塔拉会谈
summary: Former Thai premier Thaksin Shinawatra met Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto in Jakarta in his first high-profile overseas appearance since his release from jail, confirming his continuing role as an adviser to sovereign wealth fund Danantara.

title: Debt Fragmentation Is Costing EU 'Dearly,' Spain's Cuerpo Says
title_cn: 西班牙财政大臣库尔波表示，债务碎片化正在让欧盟付出“惨重”代价
summary: Spanish Economy Minister Carlos Cuerpo discusses the idea of joint borrowing within the European Union, saying there is a "new window of opportunity" despite  initial skepticism to a proposal he made on the subject this week. “Fragmentation is costing us dearly," Cuerpo tells Bloomberg's Oliver Crook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Will Andy Burnham Deal With Donald Trump?
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆将如何应对唐纳德·特朗普？
summary:
How will Andy Burnham deal with Donald Trump?

Political author Steve Richards tells Mishal Husain Britain's prime minister in waiting will be sure to turn on the charm. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Minister Defends US Pharma Deal Following Calls to Scrap It
title_cn: 英国部长在呼吁废除美国制药交易后为其辩护
summary: A trade deal with the US that increases the price Britain pays for new medicines will help patients and not cause hundreds of thousands of additional deaths, according to UK Technology Secretary Liz Kendall.

title: The Shattering of the Middle East’s Most Unlikely Friendship
title_cn: 中东最不可能的友谊的破裂
summary: Israeli tech titan Eyal Waldman and Palestinian tycoon Bashar Masri were best pals. The Hamas attack and Israel’s response made them bitter enemies.

title: Spain’s Cuerpo Sees ‘Window of Opportunity’ for Joint EU Debt
title_cn: 西班牙库尔波认为欧盟联合债务的“机会之窗”
summary: Spanish Economy Minister Carlos Cuerpo said he sees a chance to revisit the idea of joint borrowing within the European Union, despite initial skepticism to a proposal he made on the subject this week.

title: Myanmar Seeks to Restore Asean Ties in First Meeting Since Coup
title_cn: 缅甸寻求在政变后首次会议上恢复东盟关系
summary: Foreign ministers from the Association of Southeast Asian Nations will meet with their Myanmar counterpart for the first time in five years on Sunday, a step an official said could pave the way for the eventual normalization of ties between the country and the regional bloc.

title: India Pulls Punjabi Superstar’s Film, Sparking Political Row
title_cn: 印度撤下旁遮普巨星的电影，引发政治争议
summary: A film depicting the life of a Sikh human rights activist has ignited a political row in India after it was pulled from a streaming platform, thrusting New Delhi’s handling of Sikh issues back into the spotlight.

title: Johor Election in Malaysia to Test Anwar’s Ruling Alliance
title_cn: 马来西亚柔佛州选举考验安华执政联盟
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s ruling coalition faces renewed pressure in this weekend’s Johor state election, with polls showing a possible loss of seats amid an expected low voter turnout.

title: SK Hynix to Make Nasdaq Debut; US Says Iran Talks to Continue | Daybreak Europe 7/10/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士首次登陆纳斯达克；美国称伊朗谈判将继续欧洲黎明 7/10/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, SK Hynix is set to begin trading on the Nasdaq, with its debut confirmed as the biggest-ever US listing by a foreign company. The South Korean chipmaker raised $26.5 billion in its ADR offering.

Bloomberg understands that talks between the US and Iran are continuing, despite two days of clashes that have threatened the fragile ceasefire. A US official has described the ongoing discussions as technical talks.

And Japanese bonds and the yen were given a boost after Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama called for the nation's massive pension funds to increase their investments in domestic assets. (Source: Bloomberg)
